title: Canary Wave Progression Governance
description: A release-and-rollout control workflow that manages promotion waves, rollback readiness, and deployment dependencies across environments. Focus case: canary wave progression governance.
assumptions: Each release instance is unique and progresses independently through waves and checks.
Rollout strategies and policies are externally defined artifacts referenced by the governance workflow.
Orchestration jobs reliably record success/failure signals consumed by gating actions.
risks: Stale or conflicting approvals may block progression if not reconciled by governance rules.
Missing or misconfigured observability metrics can cause incorrect gate evaluations (false positives/negatives).
Resource contention for promotion_waves or deployment_target_groups may prevent intended wave assignment, delaying rollout.
